description: Configure SpamAssassin for the 'greenfield.test' virtual server in Virtualmin to address complaints about incorrect spam filtering. The greenfield.test nonprofit organization reports that emails from a trusted partner (trustedpartner.org) and their alerting system (important-alerts.net) are being incorrectly flagged, while known bulk senders are bypassing filters. Enable SpamAssassin for the domain with a spam classification score threshold of 4 and an auto-deletion threshold of 10. Ensure identified spam is delivered to each user's spam/junk mail folder. Whitelist *@trustedpartner.org and admin@important-alerts.net, and blacklist *@known-spammer.example and marketing@bulkmail.example. Save and apply all settings to the greenfield.test domain.
